task: If there are any used Apple Mac Studio that has M4 Max 16-core processor, add the one with the largest absolute discount to my cart; otherwise, add the cheapest one.
final_result_response: I have successfully completed the task. The used (Open Box) Apple Mac Studio with M4 Max featuring the 16-Core CPU (BH # APMSM4MAX12) at $2,899.00 has been added to the cart on B&H Photo. This was the only used Mac Studio with an M4 Max 16-core processor available — the other used option had a 14-core processor, so it didn't qualify.
